CONTENT.Career statistics: Statistics accurate as of match played 23 September 2022.Scores and results list Egypt's goal tally first. Score column indicates score after each Hamdy goal.

SUMMARY:
Mahmoud Hamdy Mahmoud Hamouda Attia (Arabic: محمود حمدي محمود حمودة عطية; born 1 June 1995), also known as El-Wensh (Arabic: الونش), is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Egyptian Premier League club Zamalek and the Egyptian national team.
In May 2018 he was named in Egypt’s preliminary squad for the 2018 World Cup in Russia.
